samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Asynchronous FIFO with configurable depth and width.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock signal.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment signal.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment signal.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Data input for writing.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full signal.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty signal.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Data output for reading.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="WIDTH" value="8">Width of each data entry in the FIFO.</constant>
        <constant id="DEPTH" value="16">Depth of the FIFO (number of entries).</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        // Dual-port RAM instantiation
        <instance id="ram_instance" module="dual_port_RAM">
            <port id="wclk" connection="wclk"/>
            <port id="wenc" connection="wen"/>
            <port id="waddr" connection="waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]"/>
            <port id="wdata" connection="wdata"/>
            <port id="rclk" connection="rclk"/>
            <port id="renc" connection="ren"/>
            <port id="raddr" connection="raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]"/>
            <port id="rdata" connection="rdata"/>
        </instance>
        
        // Write Pointer Logic
        <reg id="waddr_bin" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">Binary representation of write address.</reg>
        <always sensitive="posedge wclk or negedge wrstn">
            if (!wrstn) begin
                waddr_bin <= 0;
            end else if (winc) begin
                waddr_bin <= waddr_bin + 1;
            end
        </always>
        
        // Read Pointer Logic
        <reg id="raddr_bin" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">Binary representation of read address.</reg>
        <always sensitive="posedge rclk or negedge rrstn">
            if (!rrstn) begin
                raddr_bin <= 0;
            end else if (rinc) begin
                raddr_bin <= raddr_bin + 1;
            end
        </always>
        
        // Gray Code Conversion
        <wire id="wptr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))]:0]">Gray code representation of write pointer.</wire>
        <assign wptr[0] = waddr_bin[0]; // LSB remains unchanged
        <genvar i;
        <generate
            for (i = 1; i < $clog2(DEPTH); i = i + 1) begin : gen_gray_code
                <assign wptr[i] = wptr[i-1] ^ waddr_bin[i];
            end
        </generate>
        
        <wire id="rptr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))]:0]">Gray code representation of read pointer.</wire>
        <assign rptr[0] = raddr_bin[0]; // LSB remains unchanged
        <generate
            for (i = 1; i < $clog2(DEPTH); i = i + 1) begin : gen_gray_code_r
                <assign rptr[i] = rptr[i-1] ^ raddr_bin[i];
            end
        </generate>
        
        // Full/Empty Signal Logic
        <reg id="wfull" width="1">Write full flag.</reg>
        <always sensitive="posedge wclk or negedge wrstn">
            if (!wrstn) begin
                wfull <= 0;
            end else begin
                wfull <= (wptr == {~rptr[$clog2(DEPTH)], rptr[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]});
            end
        </always>
        
        <reg id="rempty" width="1">Read empty flag.</reg>
        <always sensitive="posedge rclk or negedge rrstn">
            if (!rrstn) begin
                rempty <= 1;
            end else begin
                rempty <= (wptr == rptr);
            end
        </always>
        
        // Buffer Registers for Synchronization
        <reg id="wptr_buff" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH)):0]">Buffer for write pointer.</reg>
        <always sensitive="posedge wclk or negedge wrstn">
            if (!wrstn) begin
                wptr_buff <= 0;
            end else begin
                wptr_buff <= wptr;
            end
        </always>
        
        <reg id="rptr_buff" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH)):0]">Buffer for read pointer.</reg>
        <always sensitive="posedge rclk or negedge rrstn">
            if (!rrstn) begin
                rptr_buff <= 0;
            end else begin
                rptr_buff <= rptr;
            end
        </always>
        
        // Assigning outputs
        <assign wen = !wfull && winc; // Write enable condition
        <assign ren = !rempty && rinc; // Read enable condition
        
        <assign waddr = waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]; // Address for write port
        <assign raddr = raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]; // Address for read port
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Asynchronously manages data flow between producer and consumer using dual-port RAM and pointer buffers.</implementation>
</module>
